spec_match.rationale: Accurately demonstrates using polygon(round ...) in shape-outside and clip-path to achieve rounded float exclusions.

interactive.rationale: Provides full interactivity with shape select buttons, range inputs for size, margin, and radius, updating text wrap dynamically.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Fully aligned with the feature blurb demonstrating shape-outside integration.

edge_cases.rationale: Implements a robust capability probe that falls back gracefully and displays user notices if unsupported.

references.rationale: Inherits references from the parent page, which correctly links to the ChromeStatus entry.

design_system.rationale: Strictly follows design system color and typography variables, and correctly pairs background/color on interactive controls.

summary: A beautifully styled and highly interactive demonstration showing text reflowing around various rounded shape presets in shape-outside with live CSS generation.
